---
title: "Coding Projects"
---

\*Current projects:

\[Network meta-analysis\]

R code on GitHub: [NMA_metafor_allnodes_ic.R](https://github.com/Instructional-Research-Group-IRG/network-meta-analysis/blob/main/NMA_metafor_allnodes_ic.R)

``` r
    ### Fit NMA model assuming consistency (tau^2_omega=0)
    res_mod_icW <- rma.mv(effect_size, V_list, 
                            mods = ~ FF + FF.RS + NL.FF.RS + NL.RS + RS + VF.FF.RS + VF.RS - 1, # BAU is excluded to serve as the reference level for the comparisons.
                            random = ~ 1 | record_id/es_id, 
                            rho=0.60, 
                            data=NMA_data_analysis_subset_grpID_icW)
    summary(res_mod_icW) 
```

![](images/nma_forest_plot_icW_allnodes.png)

![](images/nma_network_graph_icW_allnodes.png)

\[cNMA\]

\[GoalBook\]

\[Harvest Analysis\]

\*Selected past projects:

\[Selected Mathematica projects\]

\*R Packages:

\[TidyFarm\]

\[DataClean\]
